title: broussonetia × kazinoki f. humilis
intro: Broussonetia × kazinoki f. humilis is a cultivar of the paper mulberry plant, a deciduous shrub or small tree known for its attractive foliage and versatility in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Broussonetia × kazinoki f. humilis is used to improve cardiovascular health, lower cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
